tasks.subject: [marketplace-scoped-installs] [P2] Remove Tools & MCP accordion from ConfigTab
tasks.description:
Remove the "Tools & MCP" accordion section from `ConfigTab.tsx` since it now lives in the ToolkitTab.

## File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-hub/ui/tabs/ConfigTab.tsx`

### Remove the Tools & MCP accordion section

Delete lines 282-285:

```typescript
// REMOVE this entire section:
{/* Section 2: Tools & MCP */}
<AccordionSection title="Tools & MCP" icon={Wrench}>
  <AgentToolsTab agent={agent} projectPath={projectPath} onUpdate={onUpdate} />
</AccordionSection>
```

### Clean up unused imports

After removing the Tools & MCP section:

1. Remove `Wrench` from the lucide-react import (if no longer used elsewhere in the file)
2. Remove the `AgentToolsTab` import alias `ToolsTab as AgentToolsTab` from `@/layers/features/agent-settings` import

Check if `Wrench` is used elsewhere in the ConfigTab file. Looking at the current code, the imports are:
```typescript
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Wrench, Radio, Settings, Folder, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react';
```

And `AgentToolsTab` is used only in the Tools & MCP section. After removing it:

```typescript
// Before
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Wrench, Radio, Settings, Folder, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  PersonalityTab as AgentPersonalityTab,
  ChannelsTab as AgentChannelsTab,
  ToolsTab as AgentToolsTab,
} from '@/layers/features/agent-settings';

// After
import { ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Radio, Settings, Folder, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  PersonalityTab as AgentPersonalityTab,
  ChannelsTab as AgentChannelsTab,
} from '@/layers/features/agent-settings';
```

### Renumber section comments

Update the remaining section comments to reflect the new numbering:
- Section 1: Agent Metadata (unchanged)
- Section 2: Channels (was Section 3)
- Section 3: Advanced (was Section 4)

## Acceptance Criteria

- ConfigTab no longer renders the "Tools & MCP" accordion
- ConfigTab retains: Agent Metadata section, Channels accordion, Advanced accordion
- No unused imports remain
- Existing ConfigTab tests still pass (they should not test Tools & MCP content since that's from a separate component)
- `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint` pass

## Tests

If there are existing ConfigTab tests that assert the presence of "Tools & MCP", update them to remove that assertion. The Tools & MCP content is now tested via ToolkitTab tests (task 2.3).
tasks.activeForm: Removing Tools & MCP accordion from ConfigTab
